name: Raydan Food Co.
summary: Raydan Food Co. establishes, owns, operates, and manages restaurants. The company offers Arab meals, and cooked and uncooked catering services. It is also involved in the holding of concerts; management of factories; sale and purchase of livestock; sale and delivery of finished paintings; general contracting; real estate investment; import and export; and wholesale and retail trade activities. The company was formerly known as Raydan Co. Raydan Food Co. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia.
